title: Department Manager Vacancy at Milton International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Milton International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Milton International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton International Enterprises:
Milton International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton International Enterprises!
